How does the first law of thermodynamics apply to

What implications does the second law of
thermodynamics have for organization and order?
Answer:The second law teaches that without the input of
energy, systems inevitably tend toward disorder or entropy.
This principle suggests that we must actively invest energy to
create and maintain order in any aspect of life, from personal
organization to business management.
